---
title: "show_sensemat_data_as_edf"
output: pdf_document
date: "2025-12-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Convert Sensemat csv file to EDF

Convert Sensemat csv file to EDF

```{r chk1}

library(data.table);
library(jsonlite);
library(gsignal);
library(smtools);

setwd("~/trunk/Sensemat-Data-Gateway/recordings");

files <- dir(".csv$");
for (fn in files) {
  fn.edf <- gsub(".csv",".edf", fn);
  if (!file.exists(fn.edf)) {
    edf <- sm_csv2edf(fn=fn, fn.edf=fn.edf);
  }
}

```
